crime.quote: I really appreciate what you did for Penny, jumping in front of that bullet.

victim.value: Penny - woman being hunted by a killer for undisclosed reasons
victim.quote: She didn't tell them she was hiding out from a killer

closed_world.quote: She told them to just guard the house.

investigator.value: First-person narrator - 60-year-old unemployed man romantically involved with Penny
investigator.quote: Turning 40 and then 50 years old didn't really bother me, but turning 60 was something I just couldn't accept.

red_herring.value: Missing cat Shadow used as misdirection from main threat
red_herring.quote: Penny asked me if I had seen her cat? Shadow, was it's name. I said no, but it may have slipped out

social_world.value: Police hierarchy and protocol - cops seeking favor with Sarge, institutional protection dynamics
social_world.quote: We need to make some extra points with the Sarge, especially after letting that scumbag slip by us

media_and_audience.value: Television studio involvement - Penny mentions making good show when it's over
media_and_audience.quote: She didn't tell them she was hiding out from a killer, but it would make a good show when it was over

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist's age crisis and employment failure creating vulnerability and need for purpose
investigator_wound.quote: Turning 40 and then 50 years old didn't really bother me, but turning 60 was something I just couldn't accept
